rules.name: Party_Beschwerdesache
rules.description: Captures the name of a party in a complaint case, handling 'der/des' prefix and names with suffixes, ensuring it stops at the first comma or address indicator.

rules.name: Representative_vertreten_durch
rules.description: Captures the name of a representative (lawyer/tax advisor) introduced by 'vertreten durch'.

rules.name: Herr_Name
rules.description: Captures full names following 'Herr' or 'Herrn', ensuring the full name is extracted.

rules.name: Frau_Name
rules.description: Captures full names following 'Frau'.

rules.name: Herr_Name_Corrected
rules.description: Captures full names following 'Herr' or 'Herrn', ensuring it matches a name (not a title) and handles German characters.

rules.name: Party_Name_Complex_Title
rules.description: Captures names with complex titles (e.g., Mag., Dr., Priv.-Doz.) appearing after 'in der Beschwerdesache' or 'des/der'.

rules.name: Name_After_Preposition
rules.description: Captures names after 'die/den/des/der' or 'Tochter/Sohn', ensuring it stops before the case type word (Beschwerdesache) or other delimiters.

rules.name: Name_At_Start
rules.description: Captures names at the start of a sentence or after a period, requiring a surname or suffix to avoid matching months or single words.

rules.name: Judge_Title_Name
rules.description: Captures judges with titles (Mag., Dr., etc.) appearing before 'in der Beschwerdesache', excluding the role title (Richter/Richterin).

rules.name: Name_In_Parentheses
rules.description: Captures names appearing inside parentheses, often used for party identification.

rules.name: Name_After_Von_Zu
rules.description: Captures names following prepositions 'von' or 'zu' which are common in legal texts for ownership or direction.

best_rules.name: Title_Name_Context
best_rules.description: Captures names with titles (Dr., Mag., Ing., etc.) in general contexts, ensuring at least a first and last name.
